== Notes for [[Item:Q101857|Q101857]] ==

Cantera Burgos in his book of the descendants of Alvar Garcia de Castro, inquires on page 403 (the book can read here https://bibliotecadigital.jcyl.es/fr/catalogo_imagenes/grupo.cmd?path=10067821 that Constanza Maluenda de Castro could be the daughter of Martin Rodriguez de Maluenda "the young one" with Juana Garcia de Castro as she could also be the daughter of Martin Rodriguez de Maluenda "the old one" with Leonor Alvarez de Castro and that is why in this most well-known link of the Maluenda genealogy found here http://www.euskalnet.net/laviana/gen_hispanas/maluenda.htm and whose only source as it says at the end of the page is the book by Cantera Burgos, Constanza de Maluenda as Juana Garcia de Castro's daughter appears in between interrogation symbols.

Alfonso de Polanco died in 1491 as it says on the headstone above his tomb next to that of Constanza de Maluenda and had at least 10 proven children. Which indicates that he should have married in 1475-1480 (most likely even before that) and been born circa 1450 (most likely before that), the same with Constanza who should have been born circa 1450-1460 and married in 1475-1480 for this to happen.

Martin Rodriguez de Maluenda "el joven" was born in 1454 as Cantera Burgos says in his book, marrying circa 1480 with Juana Garcia de Castro. His supposed Constanza would have been born around that date of 1480 and marrying after 1491 with Alfonso, which is impossible since Alfonso would have been dead by then.

Genealogists Mario Javier Saban and Julio Lima Gonzalez Bonorino afirm in their genealogy works that Constanza de Maluenda, wife of Alonso de Polanco, was the daughter of https://www.geni.com/people/Alvar-Rodriguez-de-Maluenda/6000000081098706882?through=6000000076375485969 and https://www.geni.com/people/Maria-Carrillo-Hinestrosa/6000000081359912118?through=6000000081098706882

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD9D9A8E1EFBBFA9822EF79916C845E
geni:6000000076262990856

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
